nodes.name: 海岸湿地
nodes.summary: 海湾、泻湖、盐沼与河口组成的复合湿地。

nodes.name: Mangrove kingfisher
nodes.summary: Mangrove kingfisher（Mangrove kingfisher，学名 Halcyon senegaloides），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，常见栖息地包括海岸湿地、河口，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏。

nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: 河口
nodes.summary: 淡水与海水交汇形成的高生产力边缘生态系统。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: When not breeding, it lives in estuaries and mangrove, and also wooded shores, thornveld, forest, cultivated land, parks and gardens

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: When not breeding, it lives in estuaries and mangrove, and also wooded shores, thornveld, forest, cultivated land, parks and gardens

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: The population appears to be declining because of habitat loss, but the decline is not rapid, and the species has a large range, so the IUCN has assessed it as a least-concern species. Juveniles sometimes collide with human structures while migrating
